title: schedonorus giganteus
intro: Schedonorus giganteus, also known as giant feather grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Schedonorus giganteus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
